meaning: adj.使迷惑的,使莫明其妙的
examples: His letter poses a number of puzzling questions.
His very last paintings are perhaps the most puzzling.
A bigger question puzzling scientists is why we yawn at all.
There was this great opportunity for vigor-based puzzling and platforming that was completely missed out on.
What is puzzling, though, is why there is so much demand for celebrity stories and pictures.
